# anypoint_exchange_assets (Data Source)

Searches Exchange assets via the /assets/search endpoint.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Search Exchange assets by type
data "anypoint_exchange_assets" "all_rest_apis" {
  types           = "rest-api"
  organization_id = var.org_id
  limit           = 50
  sort            = "name"
  ascending       = "true"
}

output "rest_api_names" {
  value = [for a in data.anypoint_exchange_assets.all_rest_apis.assets : a.name]
}

# Filter by name substring
data "anypoint_exchange_assets" "payments_apis" {
  types  = "rest-api"
  search = "payment"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `types` (String) Asset type filter (required by the API).

### Optional

- `ascending` (String) Sort order: 'true' or 'false'.
- `domain` (String) Filter by organization domain.
- `include_snapshots` (Boolean) Include snapshot versions in the result set.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of records to return.
- `master_organization_id` (String) Filter by master organization id.
- `offset` (Number) Pagination offset.
- `organization_id` (String) Filter by organization id.
- `search` (String) Substring match against the asset name.
- `shared_with_me` (Boolean) Restrict to assets shared with the caller.
- `sort` (String) Field to sort the results by.

### Read-Only

- `assets` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assets))
- `id` (String) Synthetic id for this search result set.

<a id="nestedatt--assets"></a>

- `modified_at` (String)

- `number_of_rates` (Number)
- `rating` (Number)

- `updated_date` (String)
